channel.title: AI & ML with Don
channel.description: A commute-friendly series rebuilding the fundamentals of AI and machine learning, one episode at a time.
channel.itunes:author: Don Lawson
channel.itunes:summary: A commute-friendly series rebuilding the fundamentals of AI and machine learning, one episode at a time.

item.title: Episode 1: What Machine Learning Actually Is
item.description: Aria and Helio rebuild the foundations: how ML differs from traditional programming, the AI/ML/deep-learning nesting, the three styles of learning, the training loop, and why generalization beats memorization.
item.itunes:author: Don Lawson
item.itunes:summary: Aria and Helio rebuild the foundations: how ML differs from traditional programming, the AI/ML/deep-learning nesting, the three styles of learning, the training loop, and why generalization beats memorization.
